name: espresso
description: A concentrated shot of coffee brewed by forcing hot water through finely-ground coffee beans.

name: americano
description: Espresso diluted with hot water for a milder flavour with full coffee character.

name: latte
description: Espresso with steamed milk and a thin layer of microfoam on top.

name: cappuccino
description: Equal parts espresso, steamed milk and thick milk foam for a bold and creamy drink.

name: flat-white
description: A ristretto-based espresso with velvety steamed milk, less foam than a latte.

name: cold-brew
description: Coffee steeped in cold water for 12–24 hours, resulting in a smooth and refreshing concentrate.

name: oat-latte
description: Espresso with creamy steamed oat milk — the fully plant-based latte alternative.

name: decaf-americano
description: All the flavour of an Americano, brewed from decaffeinated beans.
